allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d[0]['id'] if d else 'empty'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('start:', d.get\('scripts',{}\).get\('start'\)\); print\('build:', d.get\('scripts',{}\).get\('build'\)\); print\('start:prod:', d.get\('scripts',{}\).get\('start:prod'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('result',{}\).get\('items',[]\); print\(len\(items\), 'items'\); [print\(i.get\('titleNumber','no-title'\), i.get\('paon'\), i.get\('street'\)\) for i in items[:3]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('result',{}\).get\('items',[]\); print\(len\(items\),'items'\); [print\(i\) for i in items[:1]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('result',{}\).get\('items',[]\); print\(len\(items\),'items'\); print\(list\(items[0].keys\(\)\) if items else 'empty'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('uprn:', d.get\('uprn'\)\); print\('titleNumber:', d.get\('titleNumber'\)\); print\('floorArea:', d.get\('floorAreaSqm'\)\); print\('epcRating:', d.get\('epcRating'\)\); print\('tenure:', d.get\('tenure'\)\); print\('yearBuilt:', d.get\('yearBuilt'\)\); print\('imageUrl:', d.get\('imageUrl',''\)[:80]\); print\('udprn:', d.get\('udprn'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rows=d.get\('rows',[]\); print\(len\(rows\),'rows'\); print\({k:rows[0][k] for k in ['total-floor-area','number-habitable-rooms','property-type','current-energy-rating','tenure','construction-age-band'] if k in rows[0]} if rows else 'no rows'\)")
